summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Subscription Tier Gating System. All 18 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed including UpgradePrompt modal verification.
critical_code_review_comments: tier_gating.py correctly implements BYPASS_ROLES = {'faculty', 'elder', 'admin'} for tier bypass
check_enrollment_limit() correctly returns 403 with 'tier_limit:enrollment:explorer:2' for Explorer tier
courses.py enroll endpoint correctly calls check_enrollment_limit()
cohorts.py join endpoint correctly calls require_tier('scholar', 'cohort_join')
spaces.py request-access endpoint correctly calls require_tier('scholar', 'space_access')
live_sessions.py join endpoint correctly calls require_tier('elder_circle', 'live_session') with host bypass
archives.py list endpoint correctly filters restricted archives for non-Elder/non-faculty users
subscriptions.py my-subscription endpoint returns tier, limits, is_bypassed, enrollment_count
subscriptions.py checkout endpoint correctly handles free tier (explorer) immediately
parseTierError() in api.js correctly parses tier_required and tier_limit error formats

test_credentials.test_users_created: TIER_TEST_ prefixed users via MongoDB for backend tests, ui_test_ prefixed users for frontend tests

seed_data_creation: Test users with different tiers (explorer, scholar, elder_circle) created via MongoDB for testing. Test cohorts, spaces, and live sessions created for UI testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 10 tested the Subscription Tier Gating System. Key features: (1) Explorer tier (free) has 2 course enrollment limit - 3rd enrollment returns 403 with 'tier_limit:enrollment:explorer:2'. (2) Cohort join requires Scholar tier - returns 403 with 'tier_required:scholar:cohort_join'. (3) Space access requires Scholar tier - returns 403 with 'tier_required:scholar:space_access'. (4) Live session join requires Elder Circle tier - returns 403 with 'tier_required:elder_circle:live_session'. (5) Restricted archives only visible to Elder Circle or faculty+. (6) Faculty/Elder/Admin bypass all tier restrictions (BYPASS_ROLES). (7) GET /api/subscriptions/my-subscription returns tier, limits, is_bypassed, enrollment_count. (8) POST /api/subscriptions/checkout with explorer tier switches immediately (free). (9) Frontend UpgradePrompt modal appears with correct data-testid attributes when hitting tier wall. (10) SubscriptionsPage shows all 3 tiers with subscribe buttons.
